models.description: LGBM — raw return rank target, 10y dataset + SPY recovery features, IC 0.180. Champion. Top-decile Sharpe 2.579, consistency 92.8%, L/S Ann 66.4%.
LGBM — composite target, 10y dataset + SPY recovery features, IC 0.171. Candidate. Top-decile Sharpe 2.304, L/S MaxDD -0.06%, ICIR 2.813.
Set Transformer — sector-relative rank target, cross-stock attention within sectors, d_model=128, blocks=3, test IC 0.141 (monthly mean 0.146). Disabled pending MPS warmup fix.
LGBM — raw return rank target, 10y universal weekly dataset, IC 0.180. Retired: superseded by v5.
LGBM — composite target, 10y universal weekly dataset, IC 0.173. Retired: superseded by v6.

LGBM — composite target, VIX/WML, IC 0.200. Retired: old dataset.
